creator: t.weustink@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 235431
Log file or build failure

security/fprintd doesn't build anymore because of multiple warning, and after checking upstream (thanks to diizzy) I found that they depend on systemd now, and have no intention of supporting non-systemd OS's [1].

The current version in ports is v0.8.1 where upstream is at v1.94.2 which will break even more [2].

Right now, in my opinion, it might as well be removed from ports.
This would also go for the following two ports:

security/libfprint
security/fprint_demo


1. https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/issues/41
2. https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/tags
